GpuProjectExec: expr=[state@0 as state, cnt@1 as cnt]
  GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [cnt@1 ASC, ca_state@2 ASC]
    GpuSortExec: expr=[cnt@1 ASC, ca_state@2 ASC], fetch=100
      GpuProjectExec: expr=[ca_state@0 as state, count(*)@1 as cnt, ca_state@0 as ca_state]
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12201611
          GpuFilterExec: predicate=count(*)@1 >= 10
            GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[ca_state], aggr=[count(*)]
              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12201611
                GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ca_state@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                  GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[ca_state], aggr=[count(*)]
                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12201611
                      GpuFilterExec: predicate=CAST(i_current_price@1 AS Decimal128(30, 15)) > CAST(1.2 * avg(j.i_current_price)@2 AS Decimal128(30, 15)), projection=[0]
                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12201611
                          GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Left, on=[(i_category@2, i_category@1)], projection=[0, 1, 3]
                            GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12201611
                              GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([i_category@2], 8), input_partitions=8

                                  GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(d_month_seq@0, d_month_seq@1)], projection=[1, 3, 4]
                                    GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[d_month_seq], aggr=[]
                                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12201611
                                        GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([d_month_seq@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                                          GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[d_month_seq], aggr=[]

                                              GpuFilterExec: predicate=d_year@1 = 2001 AND d_moy@2 = 1, projection=[0]

                                                  GpuScanExec: batch_size=12201611
                                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12201611

--- memory ---
total_estimate_cost=5496
